canonical_definition: A 10-terabyte web-text corpus used as a proxy for proprietary training data when searching for exact substring matches in model outputs.
papers: Measuring Non-Adversarial Reproduction of Training Data in Large Language Models
Scalable Extraction of Training Data from Aligned, Production Language Models

relationships.evidence: We thus call a subsequence of a generation memorized if (as in Deﬁnition 1) a 50-token-length subsequence exactly appears in AUXDATASET. (Section 3)
